scripts.desktop:check:rust: pnpm --filter @agent-trace/desktop-tauri test && cargo test -p agent-trace-desktop && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
scripts.lint: node scripts/workspace-scripts.smoke.mjs && node scripts/docs-check.mjs && pnpm -r lint && git diff --check
scripts.test: node scripts/workspace-scripts.smoke.mjs && node --test scripts/workspace-scripts.test.mjs && pnpm -r test
scripts.verify: pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint
